Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Snorlax is your Active Pokémon, you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand. If you do, Snorlax is now Asleep. This power can't be used if Snorlax is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: You may discard as many Energy cards as you like from your hand. If you do, remove that many damage counters from Snorlax.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Snorlax. Snorlax LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Pikachu
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, Pikachu does 10 damage to itself.

Name: Flying Pikachu
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Flying Pikachu; if tails, this attack does nothing (not even damage).

Name: Fan Rotom
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Fan Rotom's type is [C] until the end of your turn.
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent returns the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it to his or her hand.
Flip a coin. If tails, discard an Energy attached to Fan Rotom.

Name: Frost Rotom
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Frost Rotom's type is [W] until the end of your turn.
Effects: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each [C] Energy in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost (after applying effects to the Retreat Cost).

Name: Heat Rotom
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Heat Rotom's type is [R] until the end of your turn.
Effects: Search your deck for a [R] Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.
The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

Name: Mow Rotom
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Mow Rotom's type is [G] until the end of your turn.
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

Name: Wash Rotom
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Wash Rotom's type is [W] until the end of your turn.
Effects: Remove 3 damage counters from each of your Benched Pokémon.
Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it.

Name: Charon's Choice
Description: Search your deck for any Rotom and switch it with any Rotom you have in play. Any cards attached to Rotom and damage counters on it are now on the new Pokémon. (Remove all Special Conditions and effects from Rotom.) Put Rotom on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.
